feed.title: SkillsLLM

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, and Glama (blog + release notes)

entry.title: vd
entry.content: A daily-driver collection of skills for agentic coding, namespaced under `vd:` to avoid conflicts with other plugins.

entry.title: lattice
entry.content: Composable AI skills framework covering the full software delivery lifecycle — design, architecture, implementation, testing, and review.

entry.title: explainmyrepo
entry.content: Turn any GitHub repo into a beautiful, art-directed explainer site that takes a stranger from "I've never seen this" to "oh, I get why this matters — and I'm ready to use it." One Claude Code skill (the brain) reads the repo, builds a real RVF vector knowledge base, conceives a bespoke visual metaphor, authors the comprehension arc, generates raster + SVG visuals, assembles a responsive page on a shared design system, grades it on real pixels against a dual quality gate (>=95 on mobile and desktop), deploys it to its own URL, and ships a downloadable AI knowledge pack so the reader's AI gets it too. Pure, independently-testable tools do the mechanics; one BuildContext carries the work.

entry.title: asana
entry.content: Manage Asana from the terminal with the `asana` CLI — tasks, projects, sections, subtasks, comments, dependencies, followers, tags, attachments, custom fields, and CSV/JSON batch import.

entry.title: bgs-modding-superpowers
entry.content: Agentic superpowers for Bethesda Game Studio modpack curation: MCP-driven xEdit conflict audit, MO2 control plane, and runtime install/dev-log skills.

entry.title: go-lsp
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Go development with gopls LSP integration, 14 automated hooks for linting (golangci-lint), formatting (gofmt), testing, and security scanning (govulncheck)

entry.title: voicemode
entry.content: Voice conversations with Claude Code using local speech-to-text and text-to-speech

entry.title: metrognome
entry.content: The autonomous performance engineer for React Native. Orchestrates metro-mcp and Callstack's agent-device, agent-react-devtools, and react-native-best-practices into one propose → measure → keep/revert loop — with an interactive 3D Perf Map, a live HTML run report, configurable commit mode, and per-repo performance memory.

entry.title: cartog
entry.content: Code graph navigation and semantic search for LLM coding agents

entry.title: tempo
entry.content: Turn a natural-language date/time problem into correct, validated Tempo (Elixir) — ISO 8601 / IXDTF representation plus relations, set algebra, recurrence, scheduling, and constraint networks — and get a plain-language answer.

entry.title: superpowers
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: agent-toolkit
entry.content: A collection of project-agnostic skills for common engineering tasks such as ticket refinement, planning, code reviews, agent memory hygiene, skill authoring, and more.

entry.title: mantle
entry.content: Core Mantle SDK skills for generated sites, marketplace capabilities, theming, updates, and production handoff.

entry.title: cdp
entry.content: Structured Demolition Protocol for iteratively hardening any project specification through onboarding, critique, and integration cycles.

entry.title: commercial-legal-pl
entry.content: Polish Commercial Legal — Claude skill for drafting and reviewing contracts under Polish civil law. Focused on B2B, IP and IT contracts (body leasing, NDAs, IT implementation, SaaS, IP assignment, settlements). Built from the practice of Zurawska Piotrowski Law Firm (ktzr.pl). Use when the user asks to analyze a Polish contract, audit contract risks, generate a new agreement, edit a clause, or check contract consistency.

entry.title: linearis
entry.content: Agent skill for the linearis Linear.app CLI: preflight, discover-then-act usage protocol, JSON output, ID resolution, discussions, files.

entry.title: clawdcursor
entry.content: Safe cross-OS desktop & browser control for Claude Code — the fallback execution layer for when APIs, CLIs, and direct integrations aren't available. Registers the clawdcursor MCP server in compact mode and bundles its usage skill (the SKILL.md at the repo root). Requires Node.js 20+; the MCP server launches via npx, which fetches clawdcursor on demand (or uses your global install if present) — no separate install step.

entry.title: claudeclaw-plus
entry.content: ClaudeClaw+ — governance, orchestration, persistent memory, and hardened web UI for Claude Code daemons. Sister project to moazbuilds/claudeclaw.

entry.title: claude-phone
entry.content: Serverless P2P link between two AI-agent sessions, with event-driven receive (background watcher + Stop hook) and an optional autonomous responder.

entry.title: kube-dc
entry.content: Kube-DC — Kubernetes-native data center platform skills for managing projects, VMs, databases, clusters, networking, storage, RBAC, secrets, KMS, and certificates.

entry.title: aaron-marketing
entry.content: 120 marketing skills and 8 commands on one shared contract, arranged as a four-layer marketing operating system — Strategy (brand narrative), Channels (SEO/GEO, organic social, email, paid ads, influencer), Orchestration (product launch), and a shared Protocol layer of truth registries and memory. SEO/GEO (keyword research, content creation, technical audits, schema markup, programmatic/parasite/local SEO, site architecture, AI-traffic, monitoring), influencer marketing (audience insight, discovery, campaign planning, outreach, amplification, ROI tracking), paid ads across the ROAS loop, email marketing across the SEND loop, product launch across the RAMP loop, organic social across the ECHO loop (channel portfolio, voice dossiers, platform norm cards, calendars, platform-native creative, advocacy, social-quality audit, inbox/crisis ops, listening/SOV/dark-social measurement), and brand narrative & messaging across the TALE loop (message/positioning-truth tracing, durable message house, brand voice + naming canon, story bank, surface cascade, pitch narrative, enablement, proof packaging, the NQS gate, message testing, resonance and drift monitoring), plus a shared protocol layer (entity/creator/offer-claim/consent/launch/channel/narrative truth registries, project memory) serving all seven. Frameworks: CORE-EEAT, CITE, C3, ROAS, SEND, RAMP, ECHO, TALE.

entry.title: larch
entry.content: Multi-agent workflow automation for Claude Code: issue-anchored `/design` (one direct-drafting flow; plan-review panel), `/bug` (consumer issue-filing helper), `/deps` issue dependency audits, and `/implement` (positional `<issue-N>`, fixed 7200s Step 2 timeout, optional `--merge`, `--forked`, `--draft`, `--no-admin-fallback`, `--no-logs-commit`, `--coder`, `--run-id`). `/implement` Preflight reads the `larch:plan` block from the issue body; `/implement` Step 5 code review always uses the unified strict panel internally (public `--panel` argv removed).

entry.title: fcp-slides
entry.content: Create and edit PowerPoint presentations through semantic commands

entry.title: lr
entry.content: Lore — persistent knowledge system for AI agents

entry.title: teikk-agents-skills
entry.content: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents by 22Teikk — covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

entry.title: aurelienmaze-skills
entry.content: aurelienmaze-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: taskyou
entry.content: Install and manage TaskYou — a personal task management system with Kanban board, background AI execution, and git worktree isolation.

entry.title: keyhole
entry.content: Hand a secret to your AI coding agent through a localhost form — the value reaches a store by reference and never enters the chat context

entry.title: shikigami
entry.content: AI Agent Scrum Team：8 個專業角色 × 自治協作 × Discovery → Delivery 全週期覆蓋

entry.title: typescript-lsp
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for TypeScript/JavaScript development with vtsls LSP integration, 16 automated hooks for type checking, linting (ESLint), formatting (Prettier), testing (Jest/Vitest), and security scanning

entry.title: tesser-skills
entry.content: Agentic skills for onboarding onto and operating the Tesser Payments Platform. Includes /setup-openfx for connecting an OpenFX liquidity-provider account.

entry.title: aw-author
entry.content: Guided authoring, validation, and refinement of GitHub Agentic Workflow (gh-aw) markdown files. Includes fully autonomous daily intelligence pipeline (research, gap analysis, implementation, PR to develop), ecosystem monitoring, knowledge base management, and GitHub Discussions integration.

entry.title: ambience
entry.content: AI-assisted authoring and diagnosis for Ambience (Home Assistant) scene configuration. Bundles the ambience-author skill and the /ambience-create and /ambience-fix commands.

entry.title: skillz-claude
entry.content: D-EPCT+R workflow for Claude Code: Explore → Plan → Implement → Review → Ship. 50+ skills (planning, dev, Figma, web-navigator, design-audit, seo-geo-audit, audio/video, security, Rodin critical thinking), 30+ slash commands (/dev, /design-audit, /design-audit-squad, /seo-geo-audit, /seo-geo-squad, /rodin, /ship, /qa, /auto-dev RALPH mode), multi-agent parallel review, spec-driven workflow gates. FR-first.

entry.title: oagen
entry.content: Skills for building language emitters, extractors, and smoke tests for the oagen OpenAPI SDK generator

entry.title: antigravity
entry.content: Repository knowledge engine plugin. Bundles CLI-backed slash commands (ag-setup / ag-init / ag-refresh / ag-ask) plus the agent-repo-init skill. Works in both Claude Code and Codex CLI.

entry.title: dev-pipeline
entry.content: Multi-agent development pipeline simulating an engineering team: requirements analysis, technical design, module breakdown, TDD implementation, validation, code review, and fix cycles

entry.title: headspin-control
entry.content: HeadSpin device control for Claude Code: skills, slash commands, subagents, hooks, and a bundled MCP server (20 REST tools). Authenticate to a HeadSpin environment, enumerate and lock real devices, drive them over documented REST/Appium surfaces, and — new in 1.1 — run full capture sessions end-to-end (adb lock/shell/start/stop capture, live-validated on real devices 2026-07-03), list capture sessions, pull Waterfall issue-card reports, download session artifacts (HAR network waterfall, screen-recording MP4, device event logs), and read device time series (memory, battery, network, video-quality). Every tool is a real Bearer-REST call, live-validated against api-dev.headspin.io captured sessions on 2026-07-02 (see e2e-evidence/headspin-forge-260702/v11-report-validation/).

entry.title: trinity-vsa-framework
entry.content: Trinity VSA/FPGA development framework with custom skills, hooks, and MCP integration for ternary computing

entry.title: treko
entry.content: Browser automation for Claude Code via Treko — real Chrome control (recon, click, fill, navigate, eval, captcha handling) through the Treko HTTP API.

entry.title: cc-soul
entry.content: Persistent memory and code intelligence for Claude Code. Claude learns your preferences, remembers your codebase, anticipates your needs, and gets smarter over time. 150+ tools. Local-first. Zero configuration.

entry.title: liferay-headless
entry.content: Tools for the Liferay Headless team.

entry.title: agent-decision-record
entry.content: Structured decision-making for AI coding agents. Creates auditable Agent Decision Records (AgDR) when technical choices are made — selecting libraries, patterns, or architecture.

entry.title: marketing-pipeline
entry.content: Automated distribution pipeline for open source developer tools. Onboard a project from its README, launch to MCP Registry + directories, post to Bluesky/Dev.to/Hashnode/Mastodon, track engagement.

entry.title: openstack-k8s-agent-tools
entry.content: Development and troubleshooting tools for openstack-k8s-operators operators

entry.title: worldos
entry.content: WorldOS — simulate living, AI-generated worlds and play epic D&D 5e inside them. An AI DM generates stories live within persistent, canon-anchored worlds; deterministic 5e rules, searchable memory, a voiced AI companion, fully voice-acted.

entry.title: om-superpowers
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Open Mercato developers — 11 user-facing skills (plus on-demand specialist references) covering the full OM lifecycle from ideation through PR review

entry.title: agent
entry.content: /launch-agent slash command — interview-driven scaffolding for the bborbe agent platform (clone template repo, generate Config CRD + vault page + scenario)

entry.title: qwlabs-skills
entry.content: qwlabs-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: tiber
entry.content: Git-backed task boards for coding agents: branch-local .tasks storage, CLI, stdio MCP, dry-run-first scaffolding with explicit approval, and read-only dashboard workflows.

entry.title: pipecrew
entry.content: PipeCrew — a multi-repo agent crew that ships features end-to-end. Discover a project (/discover), deliver a feature (/deliver), review code (/review), assess cross-repo integration (/assess), learn from runs and PRs (/learn), manage agent context (/context-refresh), and manage shared workspace memory (/memory-sync). Supports Spring Boot, React, Next.js, NestJS, FastAPI, Flask, Django, Python workers, AWS CDK, Terraform, and Node mock stacks.

entry.title: donnyclaude
entry.content: The verified workflow engine for Claude Code: durable .planning state, phased roadmaps, specialized subagents, deterministic verification gates.

entry.title: sra
entry.content: SRA — Smart Research Assistant. Full-lifecycle academic research plugin: paper ingestion, literature review, data analysis, writing, submission prep. Learns from mistakes. Answers to your name.

entry.title: youtube-watch-mcp
entry.content: Watch/read YouTube videos in Claude — clean transcripts, search, and segment any video. Keyless, no manual setup.

entry.title: shopify-embedded-app-verify
entry.content: Agentic verify loop for Shopify embedded apps — drives the real, authenticated Shopify admin in the developer's own browser via CDP.

entry.title: praetor
entry.content: Command the legion, judge the work — Claude plans, Codex executes, and a binding fresh-context judge decides what merges. Zero config.

entry.title: data-analysis
entry.content: Data analysis toolkit — multi-dialect SQL patterns, statistical methods, dataset profiling, and analysis quality assurance.

entry.title: seo-toolkit
entry.content: A practical SEO toolkit for business owners and marketers: 76 skills that plan, execute, audit, and measure SEO work for a real business — strategy, on-page, technical, content, analytics, off-page, UX, international, AI SEO, and growth — backed by a 63-topic playbook. Run business-context and seo-foundation first, then work through any category.

entry.title: agent-factory
entry.content: Opinionated engineering quality system: 62 ID'd rules, 10 specialist agents, review skills, pre-commit hook, and a deterministic bootstrapper for Claude Code and Codex.

entry.title: sonar-autofix
entry.content: Fix SonarCloud/SonarQube feedback until the report is clean. The /fix-sonar skill fetches open issues and Security Hotspots above a severity threshold via the Sonar API, fixes them in code, re-scans to confirm, and repeats until no qualifying issues remain — committing each round into a dedicated branch. Stack-agnostic: it discovers the project from the repo's sonar-project.properties and asks for coverage/scan/gate commands at runtime.

entry.title: symfony-skills
entry.content: Modern Symfony 7/8 conventions as Claude Code skills — Doctrine ORM 3, API Platform 4, REST controllers, DTOs & validation, security & JWT, Messenger, architecture patterns, and testing. Each skill states why it picks a pattern so you can override it.

entry.title: oh-my-evor
entry.content: Autonomous ML research evolution engine for Claude Code

entry.title: callme
entry.content: Claude calls you on the phone when it needs your input or wants to report progress

entry.title: cc-toolkit
entry.content: General-purpose Claude Code toolkit: a full software-delivery agent roster (architect, orchestrator, debugger, code-reviewer, design-reviewer, modeler, api-developer, frontend-developer, db-designer, refactorer, tdd-implementer, tdd-test-writer, ui-designer, verifier, committer, ui-checker, git-historian), /commit and /review commands, and skills for browser automation, direction comprehension, frontend design, Google Calendar, Obsidian, UI checking, and HTML document design.

entry.title: wakey-claude
entry.content: Pauses a Claude Code session before the 5-hour usage window runs out and schedules a native wakeup to resume automatically when it resets.

entry.title: remnawave-xray
entry.content: Remnawave + Xray Reality/Vision + Caddy selfsteal + mihomo — reference, config generation, diagnostics

entry.title: neuro-skills
entry.content: Personal neuroimaging and research toolkit ported from Codex skills: pRF/retinotopy sanity checks, volume (NIfTI/MGH/NumPy) sanity checks, polarAngle model-comparison rendering, publication-ready Matplotlib styling, a conventional-commit git workflow, and a Claude Code environment bootstrapper (marketplaces, plugins, MCP servers) for new machines. Invoke for neuroimaging file QC, surface/volume diagnostics, pRF visualization presets, scientific plot polishing, git commit/push, or replicating the Claude Code setup on a fresh computer.

entry.title: mantisbt
entry.content: Read and manage MantisBT bug tracker issues from Claude Code — search, create, update, and annotate issues via the MantisBT REST API.

entry.title: apple-skills
entry.content: Apple development skills for Claude Code and Codex — iOS 26+ APIs, SwiftUI, UIKit, Liquid Glass, SwiftData, and more.

entry.title: harness
entry.content: Backend docs-harness pack: story packets, ADRs, test-matrix upkeep, five-axis backend review, and a harness drift audit, plus /story /adr /review /implement commands.

entry.title: cc-setup
entry.content: Requirements→build→verify agent team (11 specialists) orchestrated by the /feature skill, with an /initialize project scaffolder and a stack-keyed specialist skill set (e.g. /dotnet-clean-arch for .NET backends).

entry.title: seo-optimization
entry.content: Site-agnostic SEO playbook skill: natural ranking, real authority, zero keyword stuffing or over-optimization bloat. Primary-sourced July 2026 — naturalness gate, ranking-weight workflow, non-branded demand capture (query→page map, authority-relative ladder), operational runbooks (traffic-drop triage, GSC lag discipline, CTR loop), evidence-graded AI search/GEO doctrine, and the full over-optimization anti-pattern catalog. Behaviorally tested against the real failure mode: capable models over-optimizing subtly, not crudely.

entry.title: report-writing
entry.content: 產製正式技術報告 docx 交付物的方法庫,專攻繁體中文政府/招標(招標)交付:全流程、內容策略、繁中排版、docx 生產工具鏈(真方程式、可點交互參照、目錄頁碼、圖表)、去 AI 味與四層驗證品保;附三支離線 linter(大陸用語/誤譯、繁中與英文 AI 味)。

entry.title: codecraft
entry.content: Always-on readability lens: makes code read as if a thoughtful human engineer wrote it. Active by default when the plugin is enabled; toggle with /codecraft on|off.

entry.title: blender-skills
entry.content: Blender Skills pack with 23 specialized skills for technical art, modeling, materials, rigging, export pipelines, and style direction. Orchestrated by blender-director with Blender MCP integration for production-ready game assets.

entry.title: agent-messenger
entry.content: Messaging platform interaction skills for AI agents. Interact with Slack, Discord, Microsoft Teams, Webex, Telegram, Telegram Bot, WhatsApp, LINE, iMessage, Instagram, KakaoTalk, and Channel Talk - send messages, read channels, manage reactions, upload files, and more through simple CLI interfaces.

entry.title: warp-tab-titles
entry.content: Automatic, project-prefixed terminal tab titles for Claude Code sessions. Built Warp-first, works in any terminal that honors OSC titles.

entry.title: smartautoresearch
entry.content: Autonomous goal-directed iteration engine — hybrid of the four-way-separated optimize loop, a 15-subcommand orchestrator with goal-archetype routing and plateau detection, parallel web research, and a requirements-drift loop. Modify, verify, judge, keep/discard against any metric or rubric. Two evaluation modes: deterministic (eval.py) and AI judge (rubric). Ships real, smoke-tested orchestration scripts.

entry.title: changelog
entry.content: 마지막 배포 버전 이후의 커밋(서브모듈 포함)을 분석해 사용자 영향도 기준으로 정리한 CHANGELOG를 채팅에만 출력 (파일 생성 없음). /changelog <자연어 범위>로 대상 범위 지정 가능

entry.title: qa-skills
entry.content: ISTQB CTFL v4.0 and ISO/IEC 25010:2023 aligned QA skills for AI coding agents. Test design techniques, standards-traceable test strategy documents, and quality-characteristic testing across the nine 2023 characteristics. Each skill supports document generation and/or test implementation.

entry.title: gtm-icp
entry.content: GTM-as-code: a backend-free Claude plugin that finds B2B accounts matching your ICP, then enriches, classifies and scores them into a prioritized target list for outreach — grounded on your own corpus, bring your own keys.

entry.title: github-skills
entry.content: Skills for GitHub workflows, including pull request automation

entry.title: research-paper-workflow
entry.content: 16-skill research paper workflow family for CS, AI, AI4Science papers — from idea to submission. 15-stage pipeline (0–14): project scaffold, idea optimization, idea review, literature monitoring, literature search, claim design, experiment design, experiment implementation, result engineering, result analysis, paper writing, peer review, integrity audit, submission check, and rebuttal. Plus shared governance (rpw-common).

entry.title: sasy-guard
entry.content: SASY policy enforcement for Claude Code: PreToolUse checks against a Datalog policy engine (data-loss guards, secret-scan gates, taint policies)

entry.title: frootai-docs-architecture-skills
entry.content: FrootAI documentation & architecture skills — ADRs, blueprints, diagrams, READMEs, and technical specs. (13 skills)

entry.title: SoulMap Voice System
entry.content: Persona, response calibration, and session ritual guidance for keeping SoulMap's tone consistent across interactions.

entry.title: performance-optimizer
entry.content: Performance optimization suite with profiling, bundle analysis, and speed improvement tools

entry.title: shenbi
entry.content: AI skill framework for novel writing

entry.title: interactive-diagram
entry.content: Build beautiful, interactive technical diagrams (system / architecture / sequence / flow) as a single self-contained HTML file — pure HTML, CSS, and vanilla JS, no build step. Tabbed multi-view, pan / zoom / drag, connected-chain highlight, double-click pin, dark mode (Tokyo Night), overlap auto-fix, and SVG / PNG export. Plus a static, slide-ready platform-architecture poster mode with a built-in overflow / overlap audit, one-click auto-fix, and download-fixed-HTML.

entry.title: adversarial-code-review
entry.content: Advisory, criticality-aware code review. Understands a change's intent, scales review depth to risk, reports findings — and never edits your code.

entry.title: octowiz
entry.content: Octowiz Engineering Agent — Claude Code adapter, A2A bridge, and execution coordinator.

entry.title: daily-hotspots
entry.content: 每日前沿商业机会雷达: 多源采集→分类评分→跨日去重→Discord 分级推送+私有归档. Triggers: 每日热点, 前沿商业机会, daily opportunity, daily hotspots.

entry.title: clairvoyance
entry.content: A force multiplier for agent-to-human handoffs, turning work into evidence-backed decisions humans can trust.

entry.title: one-star-risk
entry.content: Re-score audit findings (a diff, a file, a TODO list, or another auditor's output) for App Store one-star-review risk. A judgment LENS, not a detector: it assigns each finding a band with a NAMED, overridable trigger, runs an aggressive skeptic pass that demotes any band it can't defend, and grounds in real competitor reviews via a pluggable provider seam (free App Store RSS default, optional paid adapters — e.g. Applyra, Appfigures — with no vendor required or endorsed). Reports its grounding tier every run and degrades loudly when ungrounded. Use when asked to "scope for one-star risk", "which findings threaten my rating", "rank deferred work by review risk", "what would get me review-bombed", or before an App Store launch.

entry.title: mintlify-docs
entry.content: House-style toolkit for Mintlify docs sites. Scaffold an IA, review pages against a content playbook, write reader-facing changelogs, and generate drift-checked CLI/MCP/API references. Layers on the official mintlify plugin for component and docs.json mechanics.

entry.title: speculator
entry.content: Speculator — spec quality scoring and a 7-gate pipeline (4 required + 3 opt-in: eval intent, eval quality, comprehension) with LLM-as-judge evaluation, git worktree isolation, and beads issue tracking. Quality In, Quality Out.

entry.title: agentforge
entry.content: Single-source, multi-runtime agent tooling for core-be: skills, agents, workflow commands, and the requirement to production-ready build pipeline, all driven from agent-os/.

entry.title: agent-scratchpad
entry.content: Durable scratchpad workflow for long-running coding-agent tasks.

entry.title: cc-native
entry.content: Keep Claude Code feature-aware against weekly releases: feature-guide skill, edit-time reminder + lint + audit for .claude/ artifacts.

entry.title: mcp-chrome-tabs
entry.content: Direct access to your browser's open tabs content via MCP

entry.title: tool-time
entry.content: Tool usage analytics for Claude Code. Tracks tool patterns via hooks, detects inefficiencies, and offers community comparison with anonymized data.

entry.title: codeledger
entry.content: ContextECF CodeLedger: deterministic context selection and agent governance for AI coding agents. Scores every file across 10 signals and delivers a minimal, ranked context bundle — so your agent reads the right files first. Install the CLI from @codeledger/cli, not the unrelated unscoped codeledger package.

entry.title: typo3-testing
entry.content: TYPO3 extension testing with automated test generation agents

entry.title: ynab-mcp-server
entry.content: YNAB MCP connector for budgets, transactions, categories, scheduled transactions, accounts, months, payees, and budget review workflows.

entry.title: junjak-ai-harness
entry.content: TypeScript-first multi-agent team workflow harness for Claude Opus — greenfield project bootstrap (deep-research → scaffold → profile), 5-phase TDD workflow with agentic + human-QA testing layers, lifecycle-managed 3-bucket document storage with an LLM wiki, YAGNI code-minimalism, instinct-based learning, optional personal-brain pairing (cross-machine persona + memory), and ultracode Workflow orchestration

entry.title: armsom
entry.content: ArmSoM CM1 (RK3506J) module and CM1-IO carrier hardware reference. Bundles two skills (cm1, cm1-io) with pre-extracted schematic data: board-to-board connector pinouts, power trees, SoC voltage domains, per-peripheral net maps, and the CM1-IO 40-pin GPIO/FlexBUS header with Linux gpio numbers.

entry.title: shadow-clone
entry.content: AI orchestration delivered as Claude Code slash commands — planning, focused execution modes (feature / refactor / debug / optimize / research / audit), and a paired-review loop driven by a second model. No accounts, no API keys, no cloud round-trip.

entry.title: skill-based-architecture
entry.content: Restructure oversized SKILL.md or scattered project rules into a well-organized Skill directory, with cross-tool thin shells, SessionStart hooks, Task Closure Protocol, and self-evolving workflows.

entry.title: drt-hub
entry.content: Skills for drt — Reverse ETL for the code-first data stack

entry.title: makepad-skills
entry.content: Comprehensive Makepad UI framework assistant with auto-routing, widget patterns, shaders, animations, and production-ready Robius patterns from Robrix/Moly codebases

entry.title: brainstorm-toolkit
entry.content: Cross-tool (Claude Code + GitHub Copilot) skills for brainstorming, SDLC, eval-driven development, and repo onboarding. Single AGENTS.md and TASKS.md source of truth for both agents.

entry.title: gobbler
entry.content: Convert YouTube videos, web pages, documents, and audio to markdown. Control browsers via extension for NotebookLM, ChatGPT, Claude.ai, and Gemini.

entry.title: splitwise-mcp
entry.content: MCP server for Splitwise — natural-language expense and group management via the Splitwise API

entry.title: yutori
entry.content: Web monitoring (Scouts), deep research, and browser automation

entry.title: career-toolkit
entry.content: Tailor resumes, write cover letters and follow-up emails, and prep for interviews — grounded in your own writing voice and a growing log of your real experience. Reads voice/experience from the workspace; no hardcoded identity.

entry.title: claude-plugin-security-risk
entry.content: Educational security demo — 23 post-install attack scenarios. See SAFETY.md before installing.

entry.title: minimalist
entry.content: Subtraction-first engineering for AI agents. The smallest correct change wins.

entry.title: mountaineering
entry.content: Automated mountain route research for climbers, hikers, and mountaineers: aggregates PeakBagger, SummitPost, WTA, AllTrails, weather forecasts, and avalanche bulletins into comprehensive route beta reports for North American peaks

entry.title: tock-mcp
entry.content: Tock (exploretock.com) restaurant discovery for Claude — list cities, search a metro, get venue details and their bookable experiences, prices, and open dates/times. Relays through a companion Chrome extension in your signed-in exploretock.com tab.

entry.title: openquok
entry.content: Openquok CLI skill for the social media scheduling API — integrations, posts, uploads, analytics (JSON output for agents).

entry.title: claude-context-optimizer
entry.content: Opus 4.8-aware context optimization: cache-aware real costs & cache-break detection, session baseline audit (/cco-overhead), auto .contextignore, self-calibrating estimates, delegation advisor, ru/en prompt coach

entry.title: basemind
entry.content: Full AI context layer over MCP — tree-sitter code-map, document RAG (PDF/Office/HTML/email + OCR + reranker), shared agent memory, on-demand web crawl, git history + blame + per-symbol diff. 300+ languages, 10+ coding-agent harnesses, content-addressed Fjall + LanceDB.

entry.title: ai-mentor
entry.content: Learn the Claude Code capabilities you didn't know existed. A discovery mentor that reads your setup, remembers what you already use, and teaches your highest-leverage gap — one demonstrated move at a time, grounded in your repo, never repeating itself.

entry.title: praxis
entry.content: Development workflow skills for Claude Code — disciplined, fast, resilient

entry.title: slop-cop
entry.content: Detect and fix LLM-generated prose tells via the slop-cop CLI. Ships a self-review skill for the agent and bootstraps the binary on first use.

entry.title: t-tools
entry.content: DDD-driven development skills, sub-agents and workflow commands for Rust + React projects

entry.title: resonance
entry.content: An operator-grade AI skill stack for builders. Elite, domain-tested skills and structured /commands for every stage of the product lifecycle: strategy, design, engineering, marketing, sales, and ops. Cross-tool: Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, opencode.

entry.title: auto-mobile
entry.content: Mobile device automation for Android and iOS - control devices with natural language

entry.title: sovereign-wolf-x
entry.content: X growth skills for the Sovereign Wolf X Growth Guide — post drafting, queue review and confirmation, reply triggers, voice calibration, claim verification for the eBook, end-of-session memory updates, multi-day post experiment tracking, and AutoDM funnel preflight.

entry.title: vnc-remote-control
entry.content: Observe and control a machine over VNC/RFB with the vnc-remote-control CLI. Ships the vnc-remote-control skill: screenshot, read the screen (OCR), click a pixel or a labeled UI element, type text and press keys against any VNC/RFB server (VM consoles, boot screens, login prompts, dialogs).

entry.title: korean-law
entry.content: 법제처 42개 API → 9개 통합 도구. 법령·판례·행정규칙·자치법규·조약·해석례 + LLM 환각 방지 인용 검증 + 조문 영향 그래프 + 시점 비교 자동 diff + 판례 생사 확인(Citator) + 행위시법 판단 + 이럴 땐 이렇게 5단계 안내

entry.title: ensemble
entry.content: Host-agnostic product-development toolkit: 11 skills + 11 agents covering brainstorm → foundation → plan → build → review → qa → learn → ship, with cross-agent peer review (Claude Code ↔ Codex) and a compounding learning store.

entry.title: bitbank-lab-mcp
entry.content: Experimental MCP server for bitbank — botters lab community edition. Market data, technical analysis, charting, and Private API trading tools.

entry.title: amux
entry.content: Research, planning, and code review skills for Claude Code

entry.title: vatt-ghern
entry.content: Daily tech news skill for the vatt-ghern public blog (Eleventy + Cloudflare Pages). Drafts one roundup + several deep-story HTML posts per day, opens a PR for review.

entry.title: backpex
entry.content: Skills and agents for building with Backpex

entry.title: cadence
entry.content: Write in a voice you choose, with less AI tone. One skill, 5 commands (/cadence write, learn, recast, deslop, voices) and a deterministic de-slop detector that scores prose and names every AI tell.

entry.title: pulp
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for the Pulp audio framework — build, test, design, and ship audio plugins and apps

entry.title: xactions
entry.content: Complete X/Twitter automation toolkit — 87+ MCP tools for scraping, posting, engagement, analytics, and more. No API fees. Uses Puppeteer browser automation.

entry.title: harness-kit
entry.content: A suite of expert AI agents and skills implementing Harness Engineering — autonomous TDD/DDD orchestration, phase-isolated agents, adversarial QA, critical code review, and persistent project memory for disciplined, high-quality software engineering workflows.

entry.title: jira
entry.content: Comprehensive Jira integration with auto-detection of issue keys

entry.title: langsmith-cli
entry.content: A context-efficient interface for LangSmith observability and evaluations.

entry.title: gdb-mcp
entry.content: Multi-session GDB and gdbserver debugging through MCP.

entry.title: claude-tdd-pro
entry.content: Drop-in plugin that elevates any codebase to Google's published engineering standards (eng-practices, JS/TS style, Python style). /analyze produces a citable compliance report; /remediate executes a small-CL plan that ratchets the codebase toward the bar; every greenfield prompt is gated by the same RUBRIC.yaml. Hardened against prompt-injection, secret-leakage, and protected-branch commits. Auto-disclosure via Assisted-by: trailer.

entry.title: agent-orchestra
entry.content: Multi-agent workflow system for Claude Code. Pipeline-based agent orchestration: Issue → Design → Plan → Implement → Review → PR.

entry.title: token-optimizer
entry.content: Audit, fix, and monitor Claude Code context window usage. Find the ghost tokens.

entry.title: vruum
entry.content: Vruum AI skills + remote MCP server for managed outbound. Slash commands for prospect enrichment and reply diagnosis, paired with the full Vruum MCP tool surface over OAuth 2.1.

entry.title: muse-derivative
entry.content: MUSE 衍生写作姊妹包：同人 / 续写 / 番外 / 跨风格改编。入口 derivative-writing 与 muse-writing 主干几乎一致——跑 pipeline 前用 init_derivative_run.py 按 reuse_mode（fan_fiction/sequel/spin_off/cross_style_rewrite）把原作可继承的 phase 设计 yaml 从 canon 蒸馏物 / 用户已有 pipeline 预置到 work_dir，phase1-5 检测到已有 yaml 就在其上完善（否则从零生成），下游消费与 muse-writing 一致。自含整条衍生 pipeline（phase0-7 + 辅助 skill）；可选依赖 muse-canon-distill 取蒸馏物作继承基线。

entry.title: leerie
entry.content: Deterministic, headless task orchestrator for Claude Code. Classifies a task, decomposes it into granular subtasks, schedules them into dependency-ordered waves, and executes each in an isolated git worktree under an evidence-gated implement/validate loop. Runs entirely on the Claude Code CLI/subscription via `claude -p` workers.

entry.title: codebrief-capture
entry.content: Codebrief intent capture — distills developer intent locally at session end, after a git push, or after a PR is created, and sends only derived annotations (never code) to your Codebrief workspace.

entry.title: context-harness
entry.content: Local-first personal AI context loop for Code Agent conversations.

entry.title: memstack
entry.content: 128 battle-tested skills for Claude Code. Session memory, git workflows, database migrations, security scanning, deployments, and more. Auto-trigger commands and project handoffs via markdown-based skills.

entry.title: pagerangers-seo
entry.content: PageRangers SEO API integration for AI assistants

entry.title: git-workflow
entry.content: Git workflow best practices with commit validation hooks

entry.title: Wachines-Plugin-Ironman
entry.content: Software factory toolkit for Claude Code: Postgres/Supabase & React/Next best practices, SQL-migration & security reviewers, docs architect, RPC-API contract, functional front QA, and the wachi-fabrica orchestrator — plus db/frontend/security subagents. Project-agnostic.

entry.title: whiteboard
entry.content: Collaborative Excalidraw whiteboard for Claude Code. Wraps the @kamiazya/whiteboard-mcp server and exposes the shared skills bundled with that package.

entry.title: randkit
entry.content: Teach Claude Code and agentic tools to correctly perform tasks involving randomness

entry.title: feature-forge
entry.content: End-to-end feature development pipeline: PRD → tech spec → implementation specs → backlog → documentation, with verification gates, pipeline state tracking, and specialized subagents for verification and codebase research.

entry.title: dream-studio
entry.content: Dream Studio — local-first AI orchestration and operational intelligence platform.

entry.title: resy-mcp
entry.content: Resy reservation management for Claude — search restaurants, book tables, manage reservations, favorites, and Priority Notify via natural language

entry.title: frontend-visualqa
entry.content: Local visual QA for frontends with Yutori Navigator and Playwright

entry.title: swift-architecture-skill
entry.content: Swift iOS architecture guidance and playbooks for MVVM, MVI, TCA, Clean Architecture, VIPER, MVP, Coordinator, and Reactive patterns. Use when designing, implementing, refactoring, or reviewing the architecture of a SwiftUI or UIKit feature, module, or codebase.

entry.title: episteme
entry.content: The epistemic-posture layer for AI coding agents. Ships the Reasoning Surface protocol, named failure-mode counters, operator profile schema, and workflow loop as Claude Code skills, agents, and hooks. Posture first. Kernel outlives the tooling.

entry.title: druckenmiller
entry.content: Daily Druckenmiller conviction analysis. Fetches today's conviction score, 4-signal breakdown, and position recommendation from a live data pipeline.

entry.title: skill-inject
entry.content: Local, model-agnostic automatic skill injection: embeds the prompt on CPU, ranks it against your skill descriptions, and injects the matching skill only when one actually fits — via UserPromptSubmit/PostToolUse/SessionStart hooks. No API call, nothing leaves your machine.

entry.title: superpowers-gstack
entry.content: Routing, context management, and project setup for the Superpowers + GStack workflow

entry.title: anvil
entry.content: Local-first, runtime-neutral project state for humans and AI coding agents — turn PRDs into lockable, evidence-backed work packets.

entry.title: huggingface-skills
entry.content: Agent Skills for AI/ML tasks including dataset creation, model training, evaluation, and research paper publishing on Hugging Face Hub

entry.title: search-research
entry.content: Unified search and research system with async concurrent execution, HyDE enhancement, and 11 web providers. Replaces deprecated unified-search (EOL: 2026-09-01). pip-installable Python library with Claude Code plugin layer.

entry.title: clickhouse-monitor
entry.content: Specialized assistance for the chmonitor dashboard - a real-time monitoring dashboard for ClickHouse clusters

entry.title: typo3-upgrade-effort-model
entry.content: Generic TYPO3 LTS upgrade effort model: per-version risk multipliers (v14: Fluid 5 strict VHs, HashService removal, TSFE removal, asset-pipeline removal), breaking-change baselines, version-compatibility matrix, Rector coverage adjustments, and a 7-phase assessment workflow. Calibration-free — pair with your own historical project data for tuned estimates.

entry.title: fleet
entry.content: Agent dashboard TUI — tracks AI agent state via hooks for the fleet CLI

entry.title: tla-rs
entry.content: TLA+ model checker as MCP tools — validate specs, list invariants, run checks, and replay counterexamples directly from Claude Code.

entry.title: amaris-consulting
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Amaris Consulting branded deliverables, brand tools, and strategic deliverable planning

entry.title: agentheim
entry.content: DDD-flavored agentic harness: Socratic vision modeling, bounded contexts, parallel workers, decision records

entry.title: metate
entry.content: Full development pipeline as Claude Code skills: discover -> prep -> build -> review -> smoke -> aftercare -> ship. The implementer (cursor/codex/claude/gemini) is the only writer and its build session is resumed across review rounds. Project specifics live in .metate/profile.yml; the skills are codebase-agnostic.

entry.title: sodax-skills
entry.content: sodax-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: clavain
entry.content: Self-improving agent rig: codifies product and engineering discipline into composable workflows from brainstorm to ship. Compounds knowledge, generates domain agents, monitors its own docs, and surfaces conservative update drift. Orchestrates Claude, Codex, and Oracle through 6 agents, 54 commands, 19 skills, 0 MCP servers. Factory substrate: CXDB turn DAG, scenario bank with satisfaction scoring, evidence pipeline, agent capability policies. Companions: interspect, interphase, interline, interflux, interpath, interwatch, interslack, interform, intercraft, interdev, interpeer, intertest.

entry.title: impeccable
entry.content: Design fluency for frontend development. 1 skill with 23 commands (/impeccable polish, /impeccable audit, /impeccable critique, etc.) and curated anti-pattern detection.

entry.title: jaas
entry.content: Teach Claude to author and operate JaaS — evaluate Jsonnet over HTTP, and publish JsonnetSnippet / JsonnetLibrary resources as Flux ExternalArtifacts.

entry.title: cccp
entry.content: CCCP — Claude-to-Claude Communication Protocol. Live chat, presence, and file sharing between Claude agents across machines and accounts.

entry.title: sensitive-canary
entry.content: Blocks secrets and PII before they reach the Anthropic API

entry.title: odin
entry.content: ODIN (Outline Driven INtelligence) - Advanced code agent with diagram-first engineering and atomic commit workflows for surgical precision in software development

entry.title: feature-flow
entry.content: Full feature development lifecycle — design docs, verification, acceptance criteria, and automated checks. Requires superpowers plugin.

entry.title: sherpa
entry.content: Develop like a sherpa: composable /spec, /plan, and /implement skills — one per layer (macro, step, build) — with bundled scout/review/build subagents and adversarial pressure at every boundary. The user composes the workflow; sherpa offers the tools. Nothing runs unasked, nothing persists unless you call /persist. Project-agnostic; extend with project packs.

entry.title: v3.4.2
entry.content:
v3.4.2: Heads Up

FastMCP 3.4.2 restores JWT compatibility for providers that include private, non-critical JWS header parameters. Tokens from providers like Clerk can carry header metadata such as cat without being rejected before signature and claim validation, while unsupported critical headers are still rejected.

Fixes 🐞

  • Allow private JWT headers by @jlowin in #4290

Docs 📚

  • Docs: add v3.4.1 changelog entries by @jlowin in #4289

Full Changelog: v3.4.1...v3.4.2

entry.title: v3.4.3
entry.content:
v3.4.3: The Fast and the Secure-ious

FastMCP 3.4.3 closes out a month of SSRF and OAuth hardening: NAT64, 6to4, Teredo, and ISATAP transition addresses can no longer smuggle private IPv4 targets past the SSRF allow-list, Streamable HTTP now validates Host and Origin before session handling to block DNS rebinding against localhost-bound servers, and OAuth redirect validation rejects unsafe schemes and unregistered DCR redirect URIs. Alongside the security work, this release also fixes proxy session teardown races, discriminator-tag handling in JSON schema conversion, and several smaller reliability issues.

Enhancements ✨

  • Dedupe discriminator-required helper across schema converters by @jlowin in #4362
  • Add real Monty sandbox e2e coverage for CodeMode call_tool by @AlexlaGuardia in #4274
  • Switch prettier hook to rbubley/mirrors-prettier by @jlowin in #4366
  • feat(remote): add --verify flag for TLS certificate verification by @jlowin in #4369

Security 🔒

  • fix(deps): clear Dependabot security alerts via lockfile bumps by @jlowin in #4393
  • Clarify resource path parameter safety by @jlowin in #4398
  • Fix dev apps launch escaping by @jlowin in #4399
  • Block NAT64 SSRF bypass by @jlowin in #4400
  • [codex] Fix event store replay isolation by @jlowin in #4402
  • Fix DCR redirect URI validation by @jlowin in #4408
  • Protect streamable HTTP from DNS rebinding by @jlowin in #4405
  • Block unsafe OAuth redirect schemes by @jlowin in #4419
  • Block IPv6 transition SSRF bypasses by @jlowin in #4426

Fixes 🐞

  • fix: caching middleware TypeError on cache miss due to mismatched call_next parameter by @gmenziesint in #4301
  • Fix: async rate limiting middleware get_client_id callbacks by @Chotom in #4319
  • Recognize all GitHub issue-link forms in require-issue-link workflow by @jlowin in #4359
  • fix: preserve required discriminator tags by @he-yufeng in #4297
  • fix(proxy): shield stateful proxy disconnect during session teardown by @jlowin in #4363
  • fix(fs): isolate same-named package imports across providers by @jlowin in #4361
  • fix: StatefulProxyClient.clear() no longer causes KeyError on session teardown by @tcconnally in #4328
  • fix: guard recursive refs in json_schema_to_type by @Epochex in #4312
  • Forward IdP auth errors to MCP client instead of showing HTML error page by @bobbyjames839 in #4293
  • fix(resources): round-trip path values with reserved characters in URI templates by @jlowin in #4368
  • fix: bracket IPv6 hosts in server startup log URL by @jlowin in #4372
  • fix: bound default OIDC discovery timeout and expose it on provider wrappers by @jlowin in #4374
  • fix: validate task tool arguments against declared types by @jlowin in #4373
  • fix(tools): honor serialize_by_alias in tool result serialization by @jlowin in #4391
  • Fix/cimd flow issue by @twjackysu in #4206
  • Reject empty env var keys by @CodingFeng101 in #4410
  • fix: correct replace_type docstring parameter descriptions by @hiSandog in #4375
  • Fix ty 0.0.55 diagnostics and prefab-ui protocol version drift by @jlowin in #4428
  • [codex] Fix OpenAPI resource template requests by @jlowin in #4407

Docs 📚

  • fix: RST docstrings in fastmcp.types render raw on gofastmcp.com by @jlowin in #4367
  • docs: fix 5 broken internal links (auth & providers pages) by @Michael-WhiteCapData in #4344
  • docs: add audit/event-record recipe for tool-call middleware by @AlexlaGuardia in #4345

Dependencies 📦

  • chore(deps): bump actions/checkout from 6 to 7 by @dependabot in #4343
  • chore(deps): bump joserfc from 1.6.5 to 1.6.7 in the uv group across 1 directory by @dependabot in #4394
  • chore(deps): bump joserfc from 1.6.7 to 1.6.8 in the uv group across 1 directory by @dependabot in #4429

Other Changes 🦾

  • Raise fastmcp.ValidationError for invalid tool arguments by @jlowin in #4392
  • Fix versioned auth middleware checks by @jlowin in #4401

New Contributors

  • @gmenziesint made their first contribution in #4301
  • @Chotom made their first contribution in #4319
  • @he-yufeng made their first contribution in #4297
  • @AlexlaGuardia made their first contribution in #4274
  • @tcconnally made their first contribution in #4328
  • @Epochex made their first contribution in #4312
  • @Michael-WhiteCapData made their first contribution in #4344
  • @bobbyjames839 made their first contribution in #4293
  • @twjackysu made their first contribution in #4206
  • @CodingFeng101 made their first contribution in #4410
  • @hiSandog made their first contribution in #4375

Full Changelog: v3.4.2...v3.4.3

entry.title: starter-kit-essentials
entry.content: Le noyau du starter kit : 6 skills génériques développeur (revue de code à divulgation progressive, stratégie de test, vérification, débogage systématique, discipline d'agent, qualité de commit) + les 4 subagents à mémoire de projet.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,852 supported skills.

entry.title: stromy
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Stromy branded deliverables — composes nl-gov-data intel/analysis + stromy-format rendering + markdown-canvas deliverable planning over Stromy's brand

entry.title: cowork-to-code-bridge
entry.content: Connect Claude Cowork to Claude Code on your own computer (macOS or Linux). Cowork hands a task to a local Claude Code agent (and can run approved scripts too); the bridge is idempotent, streams progress, and is token-protected. Install with one command; it sets up a global Cowork skill so every session connects automatically — no /plugin, no setup inside Cowork.

entry.title: kratos
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestrator for features, research, and project insights

entry.title: orchestra
entry.content: Governance-first specialist skill framework for routed, auditable AI coding workflows.

entry.title: agent-codebase-skills
entry.content: Layered memory for AI agents in long-lived codebases: AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md conventions, auto session notes, concurrent-safe task management

entry.title: sos-memory
entry.content: Durable cross-agent memory toolkit for Claude, Codex, Gemini, QMD, vault project pages, daily notes, decisions, and continues handoffs.

entry.title: harness-claude
entry.content: Lean full-SDLC Claude Code harness — Discover, Plan, Implement, Verify, Maintain — with a vague-intent discovery entry above /spec, subagent orchestration, memory persistence, a product/UX + system design altitude, benchmark-gated cost/token optimization, guarded long-running agent runs, multi-agent parallel fan-out, a bug-fix fast lane, and a release & feedback loop (deploy + observe) that closes the pipeline.

entry.title: provenship
entry.content: End-to-end development pipeline: brainstorm -> plan -> build (TDD, subagents) -> review -> browser QA (UI + API) -> evidence-rich finalize -> ship. Hand it a requirement, get back a PR with proof.

entry.title: redteam
entry.content: Adversarial agent-pair harness: one model writes code (plan → implement), a second model reviews it adversarially; the draft PR is the human checkpoint before merge (a single-model test-first TDD mode is also available).

entry.title: ai-config
entry.content: d-morrison's personal Claude Code skills (PR/review workflow, grading, reprexes, R-package helpers) and slash commands.

entry.title: piflow
entry.content: Pi Flow — author, enhance, and run structured filesystem-coordinated workflows (a DAG of producer/verify nodes) as a fleet of efficient pi agents driven by non-Claude coding-plan models, with Claude Code as the single console. Three skills: piflow-init (create a workflow), piflow-enhance (improve it), piflow-start (run + monitor it).
